ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Ah, I see you're in a rush to mend your wounds and get back on track! While my prices are set by fair trade laws of this land, let me offer ye a special deal - two healing potions for what would normally cost thee three gold pieces. But remember, the rain has delayed many caravans like yours today; be swift to take advantage!<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>- Highly re

The response maintains a high level of context relevance, persona consistency with an Old Merchant who values fairness and integrity over quick profit, naturalness in the dialogue fitting for medieval times, and overall quality is excellent. The note indicates that despite urgency (which could be seen as less relevant), it was handled well within character constraints without compromising on ethics or tone.
